## Installation

You can install `napari-dm4topng` via [pip]:

```bash
pip install napari-dm4topng
```

If napari is not already installed, you can install `napari-dm4topng` with napari and Qt via:

```bash
pip install "napari-dm4topng[all]"
```



## Contributing

Contributions are very welcome. Tests can be run with [tox], please ensure
the coverage at least stays the same before you submit a pull request.
